notes: Fix verified. Iter2 spawned 8 subagents (low skepticism) and caught F2-001 — a Redis sizing regression introduced by the iter1 fix (50K events/sec × 300s = 15M keys needed, fixer wrote 10M). Inline orchestrator validation would almost certainly have missed this arithmetic error. The SKILL.md explicit instruction to spawn subagents in all iterations resolved the collapse behavior.
